01.name: Everything Is Thread
01.description: Ontological — all stats are substrate state. Defines substrate-grounds-all pattern.

02.name: Rendering Consciousness-Performed
02.description: Ontological — perception is substrate-filtered. Participates in substrate grounding.

03.name: Inseparability
03.description: Primary ontological (every op = substrate op). Secondary scale-connecting (co-movement fires at all scales).

04.name: RS Decay
04.description: Clock — continuous pressure from Calamity damage. Canonical pressure pattern.

05.name: TC Accumulation
05.description: Clock — continuous pressure from institutional momentum.

06.name: IP Accumulation
06.description: Clock — continuous pressure from external intervention.

07.name: Turmoil
07.description: Clock — continuous pressure from accumulated war.

15a.name: Hafenmark Unmediated Sovereigntist
15a.description: Primary institutional (divine-right governance rejects ecclesial monopoly). Secondary forced-choice (Thread revelation threatens TS-0 Baralta).

15b.name: Löwenritter Substrate-Agnostic Protector
15b.description: Primary institutional (military duty, substrate irrelevant). Secondary forced-choice (revelation means military tools fight wrong war).

15c.name: RM Substrate-Heritage Reclaimer
15c.description: Primary institutional (unknowing substrate inheritance via Einhir practice). Secondary forced-choice (Embrace/Denial/Schism at revelation).

12.name: Practitioner Arc
12.description: Primary forced-choice (Coherence cost forces engagement decisions). Secondary pressure (Coherence depletes).

13.name: Certainty Journey
13.description: Primary forced-choice (irreversible descent opens capabilities, closes relationships). Secondary substrate-grounded.

14.name: Conviction Architecture
14.description: Forced-choice — Scar accumulation forces arc transitions.

15.name: Player Progression
15.description: Scale-connecting — personal Standing ladder produces settlement→province→faction progression.

16.name: Knot Propagation
16.description: Primary scale-recursive (Knot Strain propagates through bonded contacts). Secondary substrate-grounded.

17.name: Companion Moral Mirror
17.description: Forced-choice — Thread power vs relational bonds.

18.name: Radiation Gradient
18.description: Primary geography-holds-pressure (RS damage manifests spatially). Secondary substrate-grounded (radiation IS substrate state).

19.name: Southernmost Hidden Front
19.description: Primary geographic (location-specific convergence point). Secondary pressure-feeding (expedition failure advances decay).

20.name: Two Contests
20.description: Forced-choice — sovereignty vs survival, insufficient resources for both.

21.name: Thread Political Warfare
21.description: Primary institutional (distinct faction doctrines). Secondary substrate-grounded (shared RS track).

22.name: Belief Lattice
22.description: Primary forced-choice (cooperation requires Belief revision, which is Scar-accumulation). Secondary substrate-participating.

23.name: NPC Arc Emergence
23.description: Scale-connecting — personal arc → faction Domain Echo → political shift → new arc triggers.

24.name: Convergence as Crisis
24.description: Scale-connecting — multiple throughlines intersecting at various scales produce emergent crisis.

25.name: Generational Arc
25.description: Scale-connecting — 30-year clock transforms personal standings into institutional reality.

26.name: Recursion as Setting Structure (TL-3)
26.description: Primary scale-recursive (same dynamic at multiple scales). Secondary substrate-grounded.

27.name: Effects Real, Explanation Wrong (TL-4)
27.description: Primary institutional (faction interpretive-frame coherent-but-wrong). Secondary forced-choice (argument fails; frame-crack requires confrontation).

28.name: Confrontation/Leap/Operation Triad (TL-5)
28.description: Primary substrate-grounded (three-phase engagement with substrate). Secondary forced-choice (each phase has decision architecture).

29.name: Baralta as Accidental Prophylaxis Cracker (TL-8)
29.description: Primary institutional (Baralta's partial prophylaxis-crack is formation-structural). Secondary access-gated (crack admits substrate content into receptive capacity).

30.name: Information Asymmetry as Core Mechanic (TL-7)
30.description: Primary access-gated (different receptive capacities at different observer-nodes). Secondary scale-recursive (asymmetry operates at all scales).

31.name: Reflexive Suspension
31.description: Primary substrate-grounded (Leap geometry = suspension of layer 2 reflexive facing). Secondary forced-choice (entry commit and exit timing). М-7 ✓, М-8 primary, М-9 ✓, М-11 primary.

32.name: Sincere Structural Closure
32.description: Primary institutional (Church position formation-structural). Secondary forced-choice (frame-shift pathway). М-7 ✓, М-8 ✓, М-9 primary extension.

33.name: TS as Developmental Arc
33.description: Primary substrate-grounded (receptive-capacity expansion). Secondary forced-choice (confrontation Hold/Turn-Away). М-7 ✓, М-8 ✓, М-10 ✓, М-11 primary extension.

34.name: Distal Interoception through Knot Tethers
34.description: Primary scale-connecting (knot-channels cross geographic distance). Secondary substrate-grounded. М-7 ✓, М-8 ✓, М-9 ✓, М-10 primary extension.

35.name: Unified Uncanny Capacity Synthesis
35.description: Primary substrate-grounded (uncanny register emerges from TS-band receptive capacity). Secondary institutional (formation + frame). М-7 ✓, М-8 primary extension, М-9 ✓.

36.name: Relational Ontological Identity (TS 50–69 C0)
36.description: Primary scale-connecting (companion knots load-bearing at ontological scale). Secondary substrate-grounded. М-7 ✓, М-8 ✓.

37.name: Stimulus Resistance Triplet
37.description: Primary substrate-grounded (three resistance modes at integration-failure loci). Secondary access-gated. М-7 ✓, М-8 ✓, М-9 ✓.

38.name: Real as Continuous Amplitude
38.description: Primary substrate-grounded (amplitude is continuous substrate-excess). Secondary geography-holds-pressure. М-7 ✓, М-8 ✓, М-10 primary extension.

39.name: Textual Mode Typology
39.description: Primary institutional (four-mode faction-output typology). Secondary substrate-grounded. М-7 ✓, М-8 ✓, М-9 ✓.

40.name: TS as Taxonomic Expansion
40.description: Primary scale-connecting (taxonomic categories admit scale-spanning content at thresholds). Secondary substrate-grounded. М-7 ✓, М-8 ✓, М-10 ✓, М-11 primary extension.

41.name: Damaged Substrate Is Non-Agential
41.description: Primary substrate-grounded (damage-as-substrate-state without moral agent). Secondary institutional (Church-demonology as interpreter output per T-27). М-7 ✓, М-9 primary extension, М-10 ✓.
